heading: Service, repair, and replacement
label: 32704 Service, repair, and replacement
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3270415:1987., , ; , , .Oct. 20, 1972July 14, 1976Pub. L. 92–513, § 40786 Stat. 962Pub. L. 94–364, § 40590 Stat. 983In subsection (b), the text of 15:1987(b)(1) is omitted as surplus.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3270415:1987., , ; , , .Oct. 20, 1972July 14, 1976Pub. L. 92–513, § 40786 Stat. 962Pub. L. 94–364, § 40590 Stat. 983In subsection (b), the text of 15:1987(b)(1) is omitted as surplus.

children.text: the person shall adjust the odometer to read zero; and

the owner of the vehicle or agent of the owner shall attach a written notice to the left door frame of the vehicle specifying the mileage before the service, repair, or replacement and the date of the service, repair, or replacement.

children.heading: .—Removing or Altering Notice
children.label: b .—Removing or Altering Notice
children.text: A person may not, with intent to defraud, remove or alter a notice attached to a motor vehicle as required by this section.
